from __future__ import annotations


def long_parameter_list_of_primitives_without_options_object_positive(
    host: str,
    port: int,
    timeout: float,
    retries: int,
    use_ssl: bool,
    verify_cert: bool,
    pool_size: int,
) -> str:
    return f"{host}:{port} timeout={timeout} retries={retries} ssl={use_ssl} verify={verify_cert} pool={pool_size}"
